title: ADT Task Intake Schema
description: Input contract for the Dynamic Governance Router. Defines the minimum required fields for task intake classification, risk assessment, and route determination.

repository.description: Owner/repository string (e.g., 'owner/project'). Required for repo-scoped tasks.

attachments.description: List of attached file references (names or paths).

base_sha.description: The full 40-character Git SHA of the base commit.

branch.description: The target branch for the task.

control_packet.description: An optional pre-existing Control Packet (Dispatch Card).

write_intent.description: Explicitly declared write intent. If absent, inferred from request text.

audit_request.description: Whether this is explicitly an audit/check request.

cancellation.description: Whether the user is cancelling an active task.

auto_ready.description: Whether the user is requesting automatic Ready. Must be rejected.

auto_merge.description: Whether the user is requesting automatic Merge. Must be rejected.

auto_delete_branch.description: Whether the user is requesting automatic branch deletion. Must be rejected.

scope_expansion.description: Whether the user is requesting scope expansion beyond current authorization.

conflicting_facts.description: List of conflicting fact pair descriptions.
